nodes.name: Apalis
nodes.summary: Apalis（Apalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联25种鸟类，如Bar-throated apalis、Taita apalis、Yellow-throated apalis等25种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kungwe apalis
nodes.summary: Kungwe apalis（Apalis argentea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Kungwe apalis。

nodes.name: Kungwe apalis
nodes.summary: The Kungwe apalis (Apalis argentea) is a species in the family Cisticolidae. It was previously considered it to be a subspecies of the buff-throated apalis. It is found in Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Rwanda, and Tanzania. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
